description: Create a Talon voice command module in C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\talon\user\accounting_math\ that evaluates inline mathematical expressions containing accounting notations. The module must consist of accounting_math.py and accounting_math.talon. In accounting_math.py, implement a parse_and_evaluate(expression: str) -> str function that removes spaces, dollar signs, and commas, converts accounting negatives (e.g., (1500.50) to -1500.50) by replacing only parentheses that enclose numbers, evaluates the math (+, -, *, /), and returns a string formatted to two decimal places. The file must include a Talon Module declaration and an @mod.action_class registering two actions: user.figure_replace() to replace selected text with the result using clipboard operations and brief pauses to avoid race conditions, and user.figure_append() to append ' = [result]' to the selection. In accounting_math.talon, define voice commands 'figure replace' and 'figure append' to trigger these actions.
